protocol.name: weston_qti_extn

interface.name: weston_qti_extn
interface.description: This interface used to create several customized apis.

request.name: destroy
request.description: Destroy the protocol object created at client.

request.name: set_output_state

description.summary: set output state by output name

request.description: This will turn on/off the selected display.

request.name: set_brightness
request.description: This will set the display brightness.
